Package dev.quassel.ga.puzzle

Class PuzzleBoard

java.lang.Object
dev.quassel.ga.puzzle.PuzzleBoard
public final class PuzzleBoard extends Object
Immutable sliding-puzzle board.

  • Constructor Details

    • PuzzleBoard

      public PuzzleBoard(int size, int[] tiles)
      Creates a board from explicit tiles.
      Parameters:
      size - edge length of the board
      tiles - tile values in row-major order, using 0 for the blank

  • Method Details

    • solved

      public static PuzzleBoard solved(int size)
      Creates the solved board for a given size.
      Parameters:
      size - edge length of the board
      Returns:
      solved board

    • parse

      public static PuzzleBoard parse(String text, int size)
      Parses a square board from textual tile values.
      Parameters:
      text - textual board representation
      size - expected edge length
      Returns:
      parsed board

    • size

      public int size()
      Returns the board size.
      Returns:
      board edge length

    • apply

      public PuzzleBoard apply(Move move)
      Applies one move and returns the resulting board.
      Parameters:
      move - move to apply
      Returns:
      resulting board

    • apply

      public PuzzleBoard apply(Iterable<Move> moves)
      Applies a sequence of moves.
      Parameters:
      moves - moves to apply
      Returns:
      resulting board

    • execute

      public PuzzleBoard.ExecutionResult execute(Iterable<Move> moves)
      Executes a move sequence while counting effective and ineffective moves.
      Parameters:
      moves - moves to execute
      Returns:
      execution result with resulting board and counters
